headline: PSEG (PEG) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: PSEG (PEG) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: CMS Energy Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: CMS' first-quarter 2026 EPS of $1.13 beats the $1.11 estimate, revenues jump to $2.73 billion, and the 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $3.83-$3.90 is reaffirmed.

raw.headline: CMS Energy Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: CMS' first-quarter 2026 EPS of $1.13 beats the $1.11 estimate, revenues jump to $2.73 billion, and the 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $3.83-$3.90 is reaffirmed.

headline: CMS Energy (CMS) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: CMS Energy (CMS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +1.96% and +7.79%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
